description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a prominent gable roof and a smaller, attached section with a lower roofline. The front facade is visually striking, with bold black and white striping and a semi-circular staircase leading up to a covered entryway supported by columns. The exterior walls are primarily dark, with contrasting geometric patterns that give the house a modern, almost surreal appearance. The roof is finished in a textured gray material, and the property is set on a rectangular lot with alternating green and black stripes, suggesting a stylized lawn or garden. Windows are arranged in a symmetrical pattern on the front, but are less visible or absent on the sides and rear. The overall design blends modernist and classical elements, making it stand out in an urban neighborhood.
description: A two-story house with a bold black and white striped facade, gable roof, and a semi-circular staircase entryway, set on a striped green and black lot. The design combines modern geometric patterns with classical entry features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped facade, semi-circular staircase, columned entryway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, the lower attached section, and the striped lawn extending to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, dark wall and minimal visible features, emphasizing the roof and striped ground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable roof, attached section, and the semi-circular staircase from an angle.
attribute_entryway_design: Semi-circular staircase with steps, covered porch, columns, and a central door
